title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARANGAY PUG-OS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINAIT, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO BARANGAY DEAN LEOPOLDO YABES

chunks.text:
H. No. 4362 / 93 OG No. 10, 1471 (Mar. 10, 1997)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8242, December 20, 1996 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARANGAY PUG-OS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SINAIT, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO BARANGAY DEAN LEOPOLDO YABES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barangay Pug-os in the Municipality of Sinait, Province of Ilocos Sur, is hereby changed to Barangay Dean Leopoldo Yabes.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, December 20, 1996.
